author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: (1) Rewrite both Cargo.toml files to use path deps pointing at local ferrotorch crates. (2) Remove ferroviz dep — it's only used in vizgraph.rs, will gate that command behind a feature flag or stub it. (3) Build and fix any API drift between 0.1.9 and 0.2.0. (4) Get cargo check clean, then cargo build.
